tagline: America's first textile recycling franchise built for semi-absentee owners who want a scalable asset with no inventory costs and direct community impact.
description_short: Clothes Bin is a semi-absentee franchise where owners place proprietary collection bins at high-traffic locations and earn recurring revenue from the sale of donated clothes shoes and textiles. With no inventory costs zero cost of goods and flat weekly royalties the model is built for portfolio investors and executives who want passive income without leaving their current career. Franchisees manage 1-2 part-time employees and use proprietary BLIP technology to monitor and route collections remotely.
market_intelligence_insight: The U.S. textile recycling market was valued at $1.1 billion in 2024 growing at a 4.2% CAGR through 2033. Globally the market exceeded $6 billion in 2024. Key tailwinds include rising sustainability demand regulatory pressure and 85% of U.S. textiles still going to landfills representing a massive untapped collection opportunity for the only franchise in the category.
item_19_headline: 13 franchisees averaged $358953 gross revenue and $114372 income in 2024
ongoing_support: national buyer program,BLIP technology monitoring,operations manual updates,bin location services,franchisee advisory council,approved supplier network
